description_long: This is a small, decorative windmill structure made primarily from light-colored wood, featuring a pitched roof with a shingle pattern and a set of four lattice-style blades attached to the front. The windmill has a rectangular base surrounded by a picket fence, creating a courtyard-like area in front of the main building. The building itself has multiple small, rectangular windows with crossbars, and a circular opening near the roof. The roof appears to have a solar panel or a dark, glossy insert on one side, adding a modern touch to the otherwise traditional design. The windmill blades are large relative to the building and are mounted on a central hub, suggesting they are rotatable. The overall appearance is clean, with smooth surfaces and a uniform pale wood color, making it suitable as a garden ornament or educational model.
description: A small, pale wooden windmill with four lattice blades, a shingled roof, and a fenced courtyard. Features include multiple windows, a circular opening, and a possible solar panel on the roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the windmill blades, shingled roof, circular opening, and fenced courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular windows, the depth of the fenced area, and the profile of the windmill blades.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the shingled roof, possible solar panel, and the arrangement of windows on the building's side.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the full span of the windmill blades, the side windows, and the fenced courtyard.
